title: agropyron arundinaceum
intro: Agropyron arundinaceum, also known as sweet bent or crested wheatgrass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron arundinaceum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Agropyron arundinaceum can be found in teas, infusions, and capsules, often used to aid in relaxation and promote overall well-being.
